business.name: Finish Carpentry LLC
business.tagline: Precision trim and custom millwork for Dallas homes

seo.title: Finish Carpentry LLC | Custom Trim & Millwork in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Expert finish carpenter serving Dallas, TX. Custom crown molding, baseboards, wainscoting, and built-ins. Free estimates. Call (214) 437-5788.

hero.headline: Transform Your Home with Precision Craftsmanship
hero.subheadline: From custom crown molding to elegant built-ins, we bring timeless quality to every project.

featureSections.title: Elevate Every Room with Handcrafted Details
featureSections.body: Our skilled carpenters design and install bespoke crown molding, wainscoting, and paneling that add character and value to your home.
bullets: Primed and painted or stained to match
featureSections.cardBody: We measure, cut, and install on-site for a perfect fit every time.

featureSections.title: Maximize Space with Custom Built-Ins
featureSections.body: Whether it's a library wall, entertainment center, or window seat, our built-ins are tailored to your space and style.
featureSections.cardBody: Custom built-ins increase home value and provide lasting organization.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Every cut, joint, and finish is executed with precision honed over 15 years.

whyChooseUs.title: Punctual & Clean
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your time and home — jobs are completed on schedule with minimal disruption.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: Detailed quotes with no hidden fees. You know the cost before we start.

whyChooseUs.title: Personalized Service
whyChooseUs.description: We listen to your vision and offer expert guidance to bring it to life.

servicesPage.intro: From classic crown molding to modern built-ins, our finish carpentry services add elegance and value to your Dallas home. Each project is handled with meticulous care and a commitment to quality.

services.title: Crown Molding Installation
services.shortDescription: Elegant crown molding that adds timeless character to any room.
services.longDescription: Our crown molding installation service transforms plain rooms into refined spaces. We work with a variety of profiles and materials to match your home's architecture, ensuring seamless corners and smooth transitions.
benefits: Enhances visual appeal and home value
Conceals gaps between walls and ceilings
Customizable to any style — traditional to contemporary

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We discuss your vision, measure rooms, and recommend molding profiles.

process.title: Precision Cutting & Fitting
process.description: Using miter saws and coping techniques for tight, seamless joints.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: Secure installation with paintable caulk and touch-up for a flawless look.

faqs.question: How long does crown molding installation take?
faqs.answer: Most rooms take 1-3 days depending on complexity and room size.

faqs.question: Can you match existing molding?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate or complement existing profiles to create a cohesive look.

services.title: Baseboard & Trim
services.shortDescription: High-quality baseboards and door casings that complete your rooms.
services.longDescription: Our baseboard and trim services provide the perfect finishing touch for floors and doors. We offer various heights and styles, from simple ranch to elaborate colonial profiles.
benefits: Protects walls from scuffs and damage
Covers expansion gaps at floor edges

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: Choose from pine, poplar, MDF, or hardwood based on budget and style.

process.title: Measuring & Cutting
process.description: Accurate measurements and mitered corners for a professional fit.

process.title: Installation & Caulking
process.description: Nail, fill, and caulk for a seamless appearance ready for paint.

faqs.question: What is the standard baseboard height?
faqs.answer: Common heights range from 3.5 to 5.5 inches, but we can do custom sizes.

faqs.question: Do you paint the trim?
faqs.description: We can prime and paint or leave it ready for your painter. Staining is also available.

services.title: Custom Built-Ins
services.shortDescription: Bespoke shelving, cabinets, and entertainment centers tailored to your space.
services.longDescription: Our custom built-ins maximize functionality and style. Whether you need a home library, media console, or mudroom lockers, we design and build pieces that fit perfectly and reflect your taste.

process.title: Design & Planning
process.description: We create detailed drawings based on your needs and room dimensions.

process.title: Construction
process.description: Built in our shop or on-site using premium materials and joinery.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: Precise fitting, sanding, and finishing for a furniture-grade result.

faqs.question: How long does a custom built-in take?
faqs.description: Timeline varies by size, typically 2-4 weeks from design to installation.

faqs.question: Can you match existing cabinetry?
faqs.description: Yes, we can match wood species, stain, and door styles for a seamless look.

services.title: Wainscoting & Wall Paneling
services.shortDescription: Classic wainscoting and board-and-batten to add texture and charm.
services.longDescription: Wainscoting and wall paneling bring depth and elegance to dining rooms, hallways, and bathrooms. We offer beadboard, raised panel, flat panel, and board-and-batten styles.
benefits: Protects walls from wear and tear
Can make rooms feel taller or cozier

process.title: Style Selection
process.description: Choose from traditional raised panel, beadboard, or modern flat panel.

process.title: Layout & Installation
process.description: Precise layout for symmetrical panels and chair rails.

process.title: Finishing Touches
process.description: Caulk, sand, and prime for a smooth painted finish.

faqs.question: What height should wainscoting be?
faqs.description: Typical chair rail height is 32-36 inches, but we customize to your preference.

faqs.question: Can wainscoting be installed in bathrooms?
faqs.description: Yes, we use moisture-resistant materials like PVC or sealed wood for bathrooms.

about.headline: Dallas's Premier Finish Carpentry Team
about.mission: To deliver exceptional craftsmanship and personalized service that transforms houses into homes.
story: Finish Carpentry LLC was founded on a simple belief: every home deserves beautiful, lasting details. With over 15 years of experience in the Dallas area, our founder started as an apprentice and built a reputation for precision, reliability, and an eye for design.

Today, we serve homeowners across Dallas, from historic Highland Park estates to modern Lakewood bungalows. Our team takes pride in every project, treating each home as if it were our own. We combine traditional woodworking techniques with modern tools to deliver results that exceed expectations.

coreValues.title: Quality First
coreValues.description: We use premium materials and time-tested methods to ensure lasting beauty.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest communication, fair pricing, and respect for your home.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: Every joint, cut, and finish is executed with skill and care.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your vision guides our work. We listen, advise, and deliver.

contact.headline: Let's Discuss Your Project
contact.subheadline: Free estimates and consultations for Dallas homeowners.
